zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Sudeley於1133年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾文可姆時，他的父親John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington43歲，母親Grace de Tracy28歲。他於大約1162年與Emma Beauchamp在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1192年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾文可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Sudeley于1133年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾文可姆时，他的父亲John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington43岁，母亲Grace de Tracy28岁。他于大约1162年与Emma Beauchamp在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1192年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾文可姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sudeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sudeley (Gloucs) or Soudley in East Dean (Gloucs).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Sudeley was born in 1133, in Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, England, his father, John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington, was 43 and his mother, Grace de Tracy, was 28. He married Emma Beauchamp about 1162, in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1192, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Sudeley est né en 1133, à Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Grace de Tracy, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Emma Beauchamp environ 1162, à Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1192, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Sudeley 1133 in Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington 43 und seine Mutter Grace de Tracy 28. Er hat um 1162 in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Emma Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1192 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Sudeley è nato il nel 1133 nel Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Grace de Tracy, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Emma Beauchamp circa 1162, nel Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1192, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Sudeleyが1133年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウィンチコンベで生まれた時，父John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddingtonは43歳，母Grace de Tracyは28歳であった。約1162年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエルムリー カストルでEmma Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1192年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウィンチコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Sudeley(이)가 1133년 영국 그루스스터실르 윈ch코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace de Tracy(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1162년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 엘리 카스틀에서 Emma Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1192년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 윈ch코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Sudeley nasceu em 1133, em Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Grace de Tracy, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma Beauchamp aproximadamente 1162, em Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1192, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Sudeley родился в 1133 г. в местности винчкомб, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Grace de Tracy, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Beauchamp около 1162 г. в местности элмли кастл, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1192 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности винчкомб, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Emma Beauchamp aproximadamente 1162, en Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1192, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
